wordplay_note: A spotted man — marked and visible in a surveillance state
card_description: Charles Freck (meaning "Freck = freckle / spotted") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Perpetually anxious drug user in Arctor's circle who attempts suicide. Name note: A spotted man — marked and visible in a surveillance state. Anxiety and self-destruction as responses to living under total surveillance. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*.

reference.brief: Perpetually anxious drug user in Arctor's circle who attempts suicide
reference.significance: Anxiety and self-destruction as responses to living under total surveillance
